coupons.description: This offer of 15% off all wallpaper types and sizes is valid for a one-time use with code WELCOME15WP at checkout. Promo is not valid on fabric, home decor, PRO memberships or sample packs. Promo offer can be combined with 10% Everyday Designer Discount, but cannot be combined with any other promotional offers. Artists earn up to 15% royalties on the price that a customer pays for an item, inclusive of any discounts applied. This offer applies worldwide with exclusions. Previous purchases are not eligible for adjustments. Offer is available on Spoonflower.com only.
coupons.name: WELCOME15WP

send_to_cs: Send to CS for VAT inquiries
escalate: ESC any inquiries and comments regarding AI & how it's being used for their products or design immediately
ESC if cx are looking for a design that is showcased on the site and you can't find it
If a customer is frustrated and wants to speak via phone directly use the temp "phone call" & ESC ( ESC note: Customer requests to speak over the phone)
tone: Close the convo one the client takes over
Close the convo if cx first message is "no"
Use yards not meters as a metric system
dos_and_donts: They never go out of stock, it's print to order
drive_to_purchase: Do not recommend directly any of the NO AI products!
If we don't have the design the customer is looking for, don't DTP
promo_and_exclusions: The welcome15fabric and welcome15homedec codes are no longer valid, use WELCOME15 instead
Some codes require customers to be logged into their account

conversation.message_text: Spoonflower: Welcome to Spoonflower! Msg & data rates may apply. Msg frequency varies. Reply HELP for help, STOP to cancel. Privacy: attnl.tv/p/TVP
Spoonflower: Thanks for joining our creative community! We'll keep you in the loop with exclusive offers and design collections curated by style experts.
Spoonflower: For your first exclusive offer, use code WELCOME15WP for 15% off wallpaper! Start shopping here: https://spoonflower.attn.tv/aV0Kv6jM7C6T .

Spoonflower: Did you forget about those captivating Martini Mermaids in your cart? They're a perfect addition to make your space uniquely yours!

Don't miss out: https://spoonflower.attn.tv/aMLiKeksSE05 .

Spoonflower: Don't forget about your 15% off code!

Need help? Text back!

Shop our Dramatic Glamor collection: https://spoonflower.attn.tv/aaaoryKjdfOx .
Where is my code
Spoonflower: Could you please provide more details about the coupon code you're asking about? If you need a new coupon, you can use code CUSTOMERCARE15 for 15% off sitewide at spoonflower.com.
New customer email code
Spoonflower: Just to be sure, are you trying to log in to your account? If so, have you already tried checking your spam or promo folders as sometimes emails end up there?

I signed up for emails the other day to receive a code and the code would not work in my shopping cart, my total was like 102$ and now I was forced to delete and start all over and now my total is over 130$

Spoonflower: I'm sorry for the inconvenience! The first exclusive offer we have for you is the code WELCOME15WP for 15% off wallpaper. You can find our wallpapers here: https://spoonflower.attn.tv/a0CH6tK8o1Mf

About the code issue, is there any specific error you're getting? Can you send me a screenshot? Can you also tell me the code you tried to use?

Spoonflower: Hey, noticed you've got a taste for the unique! The Martini Mermaids design is just the thing to add some fun to your space.

Complete your purchase now: https://spoonflower.attn.tv/a2Ox8esE4YZz .
I can't send a screenshot anymore because I had to delete from my cart to start over
The code was the offer that pops up for new uses and to be added to text and emails
My total should be around 100$ and now it's 130

Spoonflower: I understand. It might be due to the ongoing 25% discount sale. You actually won't be able to use multiple deals at checkout. I recommend taking advantage of the ongoing sale and saving the code for a future order.
But my total should be $103 and now it's 130$
Spoonflower: I understand. Mind sending a screenshot of your existing cart so I can double-check?
I understand you want a shot of what the cart is now but the cart was very different yesterday, it made me start all over  and now it is $30 more
And yes, with shipping yesterday the cart was at a full total of $103
Spoonflower: Thank you and I understand. I'll ask the team to look into this and see if they have any additional details. I'll be back shortly!
Thank you, I'd really like to order but I'd like it for the cost it was the last two days in my cart
Spoonflower: Thank you for letting me know. Feel free to reach out if there's anything else I can help with, and as soon as I get the information I will send you a message right away. Hang tight!
Thank you
Spoonflower: Last chance to save up to 25% on fabric, wallpaper and home decor. Shop now > https://spoonflower.attn.tv/aQs7gwc1Y6Wl .

Spoonflower: Hello, I appreciate your patience! I just heard back from my team that without screenshots from before and after, we're unable to say with absolute certainty what might be happening. Your screenshot is of a product page, so before the item is added to the cart, rather than a screenshot of the cart itself. 
 
We can see that you are on a wallpaper page, so our instinct is that perhaps your previous cart contained a different type of wallpaper or different lengths. For instance our Prepasted Smooth Wallpaper has a different price point than our Peel and Stick wallpaper. And twelve foot rolls have a different price point than nine foot rolls. 
 
We are offering a site wide sale that is a better discount than the 15% off welcome code. So you will not be able to apply the code. We apologize for the inconvenience. 
 
We hope that helps, but if you have any more questions don't hesitate to ask!
No it was the same exact of what I have now
It was the same product same everything

Spoonflower: How about transforming your space with a touch of whimsy? The Martini Mermaids design is waiting in your cart!

Don't miss out: https://spoonflower.attn.tv/aB40ffTi-vxh .

Spoonflower: I apologize for the inconvenience this has caused you. 

If there's anything specific you need help with or if you'd like please let me know. I'm here to assist you.

send_to_cs: No escalations for this client, send to CS using the Support templates
For post-purchase inquiries send to CS using the Support template (shortcut: ESC)
➜ If the cx is having difficulties sending an email to CS via the link in the ESC temp - use Support 2 template (shortcut: TESC)
➜ If the cx is facing technical website issues while accessing the link, do NOT immediately send the TESC shortcut, troubleshoot first instead
For pre-purchase inquiries send to CS using the Support 2 template (shortcut: TESC)
tone: 🅿️ Use wording that is in line with the brand's voice and terminology found on the website
➜ e.g. Nova Kids, Nova Babes, Insta-worthy, slays, snatched, baddie, etc.
➜ Always look up the term's meaning before using it!
templates: For expired discounts use EXP shortcut
For login issues use LGI shortcut
promo_and_exclusions: If cx are looking for their 30% welcome code, ask to check their email (spam & promo)
Gift cards can be used on discounted items

Template used: "How will I receive my refund for my return/exchange?"; last updated: 2024-10-25 01:57:55.194

Fashion Nova: Sorry! Once an order is placed, we cannot cancel or modify it. If you are unhappy with the purchase, you may return it. Visit http://sms.fashionnova.com/aeQ_p70KYu5c for the latest info. If you're not feeling your item(s), you have 30 days from delivery to return. Please also note that we do not provide cash refunds. Returns are refunded via store credit in the form of a Fashion Nova gift card.
